steps.title: Distribute the 4
steps.content: Start with $$4(x+6)-7$$ Distribute $4$ to both terms inside the parentheses: $$4x+24-7$$

steps.title: Combine constants
steps.content: The constant terms are $24$ and $-7$: $$24-7=17$$ So the expression simplifies to $$4x+17$$

steps.title: Avoid the common distribution error
steps.content: The $4$ multiplies both $x$ and $6$, giving $4x+24$ before subtracting $7$. Do not combine the $6$ and $-7$ before distributing.
